description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:17.09 image with the docker:17.09-dind service. Define variables FPM_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/fpm and NGINX_IMAGE as ${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}/nginx, enable an untracked cache, and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs the before_script commands docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY and docker info, then executes docker load -i fpm-image-cache.tar || docker pull ${FPM_IMAGE} || true, docker load -i nginx-image-cache.tar || docker pull ${NGINX_IMAGE} || true, docker build --target fpm -t ${FPM_IMAGE} --cache-from ${FPM_IMAGE} ., docker build --target nginx -t ${NGINX_IMAGE} --cache-from ${NGINX_IMAGE} ., docker push ${FPM_IMAGE}, docker push ${NGINX_IMAGE}, docker save -o fpm-image-cache.tar ${FPM_IMAGE}, and docker save -o nginx-image-cache.tar ${NGINX_IMAGE}. In the test stage add a test job that runs the command [[ "$(docker run --rm ${FPM_IMAGE} php index.php)" == "Hello World" ]] || false.
